creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks you for your report. 

It seems something went wrong with your download of the source for 
this port.  I could not find any such problem reported by FreeBSD's 
regular builders nor reproduce this myself. 

Removing $PORTSDIR/distfiles/wmMoonClock*.tar.gz and starting the 
build again should fix this for you.  If it does not, perhaps there 
is some web proxy/cache in between you and the download server?
